SPRight.name: IDW_SP_QueryRunner
SPRight.Description: Allows this user to access the query runner page

SPRight.name: IDW_SP_QuerySaveReport
SPRight.Description: Allows this user to save query plugin queries as reports

SPRight.name: IDW_SP_QueryRunner_Application
SPRight.Description: Allows this user to run Application type queries

Capability.name: IDW_SP_QueryRunner_Capability
Capability.Description: Allows this user to run code via the Rule Runner

Capability.name: IDW_SP_QuerySaveReport_Capability
Capability.Description: Allows this user to save query plugin queries as reports
